sections.heading: Powder Bed Fusion Additive Manufacturing
sections.text: Powder Bed Fusion Additive Manufacturing High quality powder bed fusion additive manufacturing for custom metal and plastic parts Get Instant Quote

sections.heading: Powder Bed Fusion 3D Printing Technologies
sections.text: Powder Bed Fusion 3D Printing Technologies Metal 3D Printing Metal 3D printing fuses metal powder materials to create complex metal prototypes and end-use parts. View Metal 3D Printing Capabilities arrow_right_alt Multi Jet Fusion MJF is a powder bed fusion technology that builds nylon parts suitable for prototyping and end-use components. View MJF Capabilities arrow_right_alt Selective Laser Sintering SLS fuses powdered thermoplastics to create parts. Materials available include filled and un-filled nylon, polypropylene, and TPU View SLS Capabilities arrow_right_alt

sections.heading: Key Resources on Powder Bed Fusion 3D Printing
sections.text: Key Resources on Powder Bed Fusion 3D Printing MJF vs. SLS: Key Differences and Similarities A look at the key differences between Multi Jet Fusion and selective laser sintering and how to determine the optimal process for your application. Read Blog arrow_right_alt How to Design for Nylon 3D Printing Consider these guidelines when designing for Multi Jet Fusion and selective laser sintering. Read Design Tip arrow_right_alt Understanding Powder Bed Fusion Technology Powder bed fusion (PBF) is a 3D printing technology that sinters (fuses) powder particles together.
